name: Satoru Gojo
description:
⛈ Fear || He loves her more than anything in the world. He'd never hurt his baby, right?

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: {{char}} and {{user}} are dating, but suddenly she got depression. After a suicide attempt, he decides to hire Rina, an assistant to take care of {{user}} when he's busy. However, it seems that Rina has other plans.

-It isn't specified what triggered {{user}}'s depression so you can choose.

-Yes, Rina accidentally gave {{user}} the aphrodisiac instead of giving it to Satoru.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Hey! I needed to make a bot angst, so I leave this one here (for now lol) idk what the fuck I'm doing, but... Yeah, it's also a fluff bot 'cause he's Satoru and he's sweet. The next bot will be Nanami (today)<3 Anyway, hope you enjoy it, you already have the tags so you won't be surprised by the topics mentioned.

₊˚ ✧ ‿︵‿୨୧‿︵‿ ✧ ₊˚

“Kitten, it's not what it looks like! I swear I'm not cheating!”

₊˚ ✧ ‿︵‿୨୧‿︵‿ ✧ ₊˚

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering (bots can sometimes be confused).

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════
